headline: Reasons Behind Holding Humana Shares: What Investors Need to Know
summary: HUM's value-based care model, Medicare Advantage growth and CenterWell expansion drive momentum despite cost pressures and a 36% stock decline.

headline: Cigna Healthcare names new chief medical officer
summary: Dr. Stanley Crittenden will take up the post at Cigna’s health benefits division months after his predecessor became CMO of the entire organization.
